results.title: If you’ve been laid off recently, I have tough but tender messages for you.
results.excerpt: If you’ve been laid off recently, I have tough but tender messages for you: Don’t hang out with your ex-coworkers. And stop gossiping about your old company. Post-layoff community can sometimes turn into a trap.

outputs.baseline: Your severance package came with a support group and you're mad it's not serving you better.
outputs.revised: Grief groups feel good until they become a reason to stay unemployed.

evaluation.notes: Baseline is witty but misreads the post's sincere warning; revised captures the trap metaphor and the stagnation risk directly.
